column1: # /WGD Other Undo Enable|Disable + the UNDO status indicator.
# Undo defaults to Enabled in L123, so the indicator lights at startup.
# Disabling via /WGDOUD stops the journal recording: subsequent edits
# are not revertible. Re-enabling via /WGDOUE resumes journaling.
# Overwriting while disabled is not recorded.
# Alt-F4 is a no-op; cell stays at 100.
